title: Xtra Tender Tuscan Pork Skillet
description: Savory and tender Italian dish featuring pork, vegetables, and a hint of sweetness, all cooked in one pot. This Whole30-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped carrots and zucchini to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 4 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, powdered sugar, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the pork to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the pork is tender and the sauce has thickened, about 15 minutes.
Use a spoon to shape the pork and vegetables into nigiri-like shapes and serve hot.
